name: Japanese Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg toasted chicken Ramen noodles (broken into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the Ramen noodles in a 350 degrees oven for about 10 minutes, stirring several times.
2. Add almonds and sesame seeds to the toasted noodles; allow to cool.
3. Gently mix cabbage, diced onions, and the cooled toasted Ramen noodles.
4. Just before serving, add the salad dressing made with salad oil, cider vinegar, and sugar from the ramen seasoning packet.
